title: [spec-compliance] Rust missing human_address_from_pubkey fn
description: spec/03-addressing.md:35 MUST reference Rust human_address_from_pubkey (and test/vectors/node_address.json) but rust/lichen-link/src/identity.rs and lib.rs:60 have no definition (only iid_from_pubkey). C impl exists (lichen_pubkey_to_human_address). Code differs from spec. Introduced/exposed by commit 7af435a92 (spec update). Violates cross-impl consistency requirement. --priority 1 --type bug --json
close_reason: Added human_address_from_pubkey and human_address_from_iid in rust/lichen-link/src/identity.rs matching test vectors and Python/C; added unit test; fixes spec compliance for addressing.
